floating.title: Daybreak · Today
floating.empty: No tasks today. Jot something above to start.

topbar.placeholder: Tell Daybreak what you need to do…

briefing.subtitle: Daybreak has prepared today's optimal plan.

freeTime.label: Available focus time today: {{hours}}
freeTime.empty: Nothing booked today — the workday is wide open

briefing.empty: No tasks today. ⌘K to AI-parse, or N to add manually.

todos.title: Tasks
todos.empty: No tasks. ⌘K to AI-parse, or N to add manually.

newTask.title: New task
newTask.subtitle: Manual entry, no AI. For AI parsing use the top bar (⌘K).

fields.title: Title
fields.reasonPlaceholder: Why now, what you'll get from doing it. Shown in Briefing.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.unscheduledHint: Drag onto the grid to schedule

reflect.title: Reflect
reflect.subtitle: Look back at today/this week and let AI distill a reflection
reflect.empty: No reflection for this period yet. Tap "Generate reflection" to let AI help.

chat.title: Chat
chat.placeholder: Ask Daybreak anything about your day… (⌘+Enter to send)
chat.noConvs: No chats yet. Click above to start one.
chat.sendHint: ⌘+Enter to send · Today's todos and Telos are auto-attached as context
chat.emptyBody: Today's todos, Telos goals and the current time are auto-attached. Ask things like "can I push these two meetings to tomorrow" or "which should I tackle first".

telos.title: Telos · Long-term goals
telos.subtitle: Tell Daybreak your direction. It'll factor these in when planning your day and briefing.
telos.empty: No goals yet. Tap "Add" to start.

fields.title: Goal
fields.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Ship Daybreak desktop 1.0 by Q3
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Why this matters, definition of done…

llm.title: AI provider
llm.description: Pick an LLM provider and paste your API key. Keys are stored locally in localStorage and never uploaded.

usage.title: Usage
usage.description: Cumulative tokens across all LLM calls. Estimated cost uses DeepSeek-chat public pricing (input ¥0.001/1K, output ¥0.002/1K) — actual billing may differ.

data.title: Data
data.description: The local SQLite database lives in macOS Application Support; nothing is uploaded.
data.clearTodosConfirm: Delete all todos from SQLite? This is irreversible. Export JSON first as a backup.
data.resetSettingsConfirm: Reset language, theme and API keys to defaults?

common.clearConfirm: Clear all {{count}} completed tasks? This cannot be undone.
